start.text: You hear a loud *CRACK*! A wheel on your wagon has split, grinding you to a halt on the muddy path. What do you do?

pass.message: repairs the wheel with a few carefully-applied braces.

fail.message: tries to put a few braces on the wheel, but they fall off.

options.text: Search the nearby woods for a better path.
Abandon the wagon and continue on foot.

pass.message: repairs the wheel with a few carefully-applied braces.

repair_success.text: Using your tools and some nearby wood, you skillfully brace the wheel. It's not pretty, but it'll hold until you reach town.

repair_fail.text: You fumble with the repair, and the wheel splinters further. You've lost valuable time.

bypass_success.text: You scout a narrow deer trail that bypasses the mud pit. You get around the broken wagon and back to the main path.

bypass_fail.text: You get turned around in the woods and stumble into a nest of giant spiders!

combat_victory.text: After a pitched battle, you stand victorious over the slain spiders. You shake the ichor from your blades and find the path.

abandon_wagon.text: Deciding it's not worth the trouble, you grab your essential gear and leave the wagon behind.
